auth.volunteerSubtitle: Sign in or create an account to join as a volunteer.
auth.error.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.error.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error.passwordLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
auth.error.passwordUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
auth.error.passwordNumber: Password must include at least one number.
auth.error.passwordSpecial: Password must include at least one special character.
NETWORK_ERROR: A network error occurred. Please check your connection.
AUTHENTICATION_TOKEN_TABLE_NOT_INITIALIZ: Authentication token table is not initialized. Please contact support.
AUTHENTICATION_USER_TABLE_NOT_INITIALIZE: Authentication user table is not initialized. Please contact support.
DATABASE_ERROR: A database error occurred. Please try again later.
RECAPTCHA_UNKNOWN_REMOTE_ADDRESS: Unable to determine your remote address for reCAPTCHA.
RECAPTCHA_REQWEST_ERROR: Failed to communicate with reCAPTCHA service.
RECAPTCHA_REQUEST_STATUS_ERROR: Received an error status from reCAPTCHA.
RECAPTCHA_REQUEST_ERROR: A request error occurred during reCAPTCHA verification.
RECAPTCHA_VERIFICATION_FAILED: reCAPTCHA validation failed. Please try again.
REGISTER_INVALID_EMAIL_FORMAT: The provided email format is invalid.
REGISTER_WEAK_PASSWORD: The provided password is too weak.
REGISTER_USER_EMAIL_CONFLICT: This email address is already in use.
ME_USER_NOT_FOUND: The user associated with the provided token was not found.
DONATION_INVALID_AMOUNT: Please provide a valid donation amount.
STRIPE_FAILED_TO_CREATE_CHECKOUT_SESSION: Unable to open the checkout page right now. Please try again.
STRIPE_CHECKOUT_SESSION_URL_MISSING: Checkout URL is unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.recaptcha.text1: This form is protected by reCAPTCHA v3. For more information, see the Google
home.about.text: We actively rescue stray dogs and cats, treat them, vaccinate them, and find them new homes. Every day, our dedicated team of volunteers works tirelessly to ensure that no animal is left behind. That's why we built this platform—to connect our furry friends with loving families faster.
home.adopt.title: Find a soul that matches yours
home.adopt.subtitle: From rescue to home: real stories begin with one kind decision.
home.adopt.story: These companions are ready to trade shelter walls for warm evenings, silly routines, and a forever family. Browse profiles, meet them, and choose your future best friend.
home.donate.text: Every contribution helps us save more lives. Please consider making a donation today.
home.donate.name: Your Name (Optional)
home.donate.confirm_omitted: Are you sure you want to donate without leaving a name or message? It is nice to know who our heroes are!
home.donate.success: Thank you for your generous donation!
home.footer.tagline: Every paw deserves a safe home and a soft place to rest.
dashboard.petsListDesc: View and manage all pets in the system.

pets.title: Our Pets
pets.noPets: No pets found matching your criteria.
donations.title: Community Donations
donations.subtitle: Every contribution helps us rescue, treat, and rehome more animals.
donations.empty: No donations have been recorded yet.
donations.success.title: Thank you for supporting our animals!
donations.success.body: Your donation has been received and already started doing good.
